description_long: This is a packaged snack bar with a rectangular, pillow-shaped form, wrapped in a light beige and cream-colored wrapper. The front of the package features the brand name 'Kalev' and the product name 'Linnupiim' in stylized script, along with an illustration of a chocolate-covered treat and a depiction of a bird. The wrapper has crimped edges on both short sides, typical of individually wrapped snack bars. The back of the package displays nutritional and ingredient information, as well as a barcode and certification marks. The overall appearance suggests a confectionery product, likely with a chocolate or cream filling. The packaging is slightly glossy, indicating a plastic or foil laminate material.
description: A rectangular, cream-colored snack bar in a glossy wrapper with branding and product illustrations, featuring crimped edges and detailed labeling.
description_view_0: A narrow side view showing the thin edge and crimped end of the snack bar wrapper.
description_view_1: The front view displays the product branding, name, and an illustration of the snack, with clear decorative graphics.
description_view_2: The opposite narrow side, similar to view 0, showing the thin edge and some wrapper graphics.
description_view_3: The back view reveals nutritional information, a barcode, and certification marks on the wrapper.
attribute_brand_logo: The 'Kalev' brand logo is visible on the front of the wrapper, located in the upper center, written in gold script.
attribute_flavor_indication: The front of the wrapper shows an illustration of a chocolate-covered treat and the word 'Linnupiim', suggesting a chocolate or cream flavor.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Nutritional information and ingredients are visible on the back of the wrapper, including a barcode and certification marks.
attribute_promotional_graphics: An illustration of a bird and a chocolate treat are present on the front, but no special promotional graphics or offers are visible.
